title: cordia glabrifolia
intro: Cordia glabrifolia, also known as the Manjack or Manjack tree, is a species of flowering plant in the bignonia family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cordia glabrifolia include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach pain. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
